headline: Ahold Delhaize & Uber Eats Expand Partnership: Upside Ahead?
summary: UBER expands Uber Eats grocery delivery with Ahold Delhaize USA, adding nearly 2,000 Northeast/Mid-Atlantic stores, promos, Uber One perks and SNAP/EBT.

headline: Ahold Delhaize President and CEO Frans Muller to retire
summary: The company’s board nominated Thierry Garnier, who is currently CEO of a home improvement company, to step into the leadership role in April 2027.
